title: Frogman
description: What if the frogs were not frogs nor man? With this pack you can turn your beautiful frogs and tadpoles into ugly disgusting creatures that should have never seen the light of day.
body:
## Requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) / [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
There is not really much to explain in words about this pack, so take time looking at my beautiful creations

## Click the spoiler to see the custom options ([Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) Required)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## Blinking Mobs
This option enables a randomly timed blinking texture to make Frogman and his friends feel more lively.
## Fresh Animations Compat
This option replaces the custom models in this pack with tweaked versions of [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX)'s models so that the models from here have the respected animations of Fresh Animations.
### This is not a standalone pack and [Fresh animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) also needs to be enabled for the animations to work. Think of it as a FA Extention and put it over Fresh Animations
![facompatorder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80e1db8342f139cb8b169102b1a77a394eb97af5_0.webp)

</details>



![2 of the 11 frogman variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa873dd1dfe61a123015433ed0164b5bd0eb9740_0.webp)

Arn't the baby frogmen just the cutest?
![A school of baby frogmen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcb76e91cef7dd4bee0629aafe397dda05f18825_0.webp)

We've done much more than just the frogs
![all 3 frogman lights variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab93d83cee97c46f1bff5fc7b9f6032e0445f9ab_0.webp)

By much more I mean much more (Look at the showcases in the gallery)
![Advancements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cacd848bc929a8e06ae95152ab19f07d42e274f.png)
![Advancements2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/deb524d892a30da0c4d1d741105b7419643879be.png)
![Happy Ghast in the sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/054e3e40be19ce963d8f58020a9139c85a14fefa_0.webp)

There are also name tag variants of both the normal frogmen and the happy ghasts (They are case sensetive)
- Frogmen Variants
  - **King Frogman**
  - **Queen Frogman**
- Happy Ghast Variants
  - **:|**
  - **: |**
  - **`,|**
  - **:O**
  - **:b**
  - **:)**

![Happy Ghast Line Up](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b469bb03fbee160f5db7f8273ce00189bc34be7_0.webp)
![Frogman Nametag showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18602bff2d46742135f09b02049431330db31e95_0.webp)

A list of all the things this pack has

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- 2 custom respackopts options
- 9 naturally spawning frogman variants
- 2 nametag frogman variants
- retextured froglights
- retextured chiseled deepslate
- retextured explorer potery sherd
- retextured ward armor trim
- retextured sticky piston
- retextured slime and slimeballs
- retextured pufferfish entity and item
- retextured "Humble" painting
- retextured oozing effect, potions, and arrows
- retextured pumpkin pie (forgot to include in showcase)
- retextured carved pumpkins and jack o` lantern
- retextured enchanted book
- retextured snow golems
- retextured villagers
- retextured zombie villagers
- retextured witches
- retextured wandering traders
- retextured pillagers
- retextured vindicators
- retextured evokers
- retextured illusioners
- retextured iron golems
- retextured copper golems
- retextured piglin
- retextured piglin brute
- retextured zombified piglin
- retextured strider
- retextured ravager
- retextured ghast
- retextured happy ghast
- retextured ghastling
- retextured blaze
- retextured magma cube
- retextured hoglin
- retextured zoglin
- a language change of almost all things related to the things in this pack

</details>

[![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cce17ef2a4f63c4432ba2dbadb66723bb10df937.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/frogman)
